title: New Pharma Site: Readiness Roadmap
alt: Five phased steps for setting up an inspection-ready new pharma site

items.label: Define and design
items.desc: Lock scope, licence strategy, URS and an initial risk assessment.

items.label: Build the quality system
items.desc: Stand up core GMP/GDP systems and documentation before operations.

items.label: Construct and qualify
items.desc: Complete the facility, then run DQ, IQ, OQ and PQ under a VMP.

items.label: Operate and generate evidence
items.desc: Run deviations, change control, CAPA and self-inspections for real.

items.label: Verify readiness
items.desc: Independent mock inspection, remediate, then host the MHRA.
